import requests
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/fetch')
def fetch():
    url = request.args.get('url', 'https://example.com')
    proxies = {
        'http': 'http://test:pass@localhost:8080',
        'https': 'http://test:pass@localhost:8090'
    }
    session = requests.Session()
    prep = requests.Request('GET', url).prepare()
    session.rebuild_proxies(prep, proxies)
    return 'OK'
perCve.safeFixture:
import requests
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/fetch')
def fetch():
    url = request.args.get('url', 'http://example.com')
    proxies = {
        'http': 'http://test:pass@localhost:8080',
        'https': 'http://test:pass@localhost:8090'
    }
    session = requests.Session()
    prep = requests.Request('GET', url).prepare()
    session.rebuild_proxies(prep, proxies)
    return 'OK'

perCve.vulnerableFixture:
from flask import Flask, request
import cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization as serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/pkcs12')
def pkcs12_route():
    password = request.args.get('password', 'default').encode()
    key = serialization.load_pem_private_key(
        b'-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n...\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----',
        None
    )
    cert = serialization.load_pem_x509_certificate(
        b'-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----'
    )
    encryption = (
        serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12
        .encryption_builder()
        .hmac_hash(hashes.SHA256())
        .build(password)
    )
    serialize_key_and_certificates(b'name', key, cert, [], encryption)
    return 'Done'
perCve.safeFixture:
from flask import Flask
import cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization as serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/pkcs12')
def pkcs12_route():
    key = serialization.load_pem_private_key(
        b'-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n...\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----',
        None
    )
    cert = serialization.load_pem_x509_certificate(
        b'-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----'
    )
    encryption = (
        serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12
        .encryption_builder()
        .hmac_hash(hashes.SHA256())
        .build(b'static-password')
    )
    serialize_key_and_certificates(b'name', key, cert, [], encryption)
    return 'Done'
